title: Mahmoud and Ehab and the even-odd game

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Mahmoud and Ehab and the even-odd game". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/959/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers.
content.outputFormat: Print 'Ehab' if the number of odd integers is even, otherwise print 'Mahmoud'.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Count the number of odd integers in the array and check if it's even or odd.
